goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'mumford theatre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'aylesbray lodge guest house'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'hotel type', and 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
